parents.subject: LU-3935 scrub: support dryrun mode OI scrub

commit.subject: LU-2424 ptlrpc: add rpc_cache
commit.message:
LU-2424 ptlrpc: add rpc_cache

Add rpc_cache for allocating ptlrpc_requests.

This patch is back-ported from the following patch:
Lustre-commit: 4f06809b969eef0b091fa1a0a1afd3b2c9eb6a1a
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/6874

Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-689

Signed-off-by: Andriy Skulysh <Andriy_Skulysh@xyratex.com>
Change-Id: Ib66a94c8fa5d23612fa44a0a1938efa90979055a
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
